signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders; Alpenglow Upgrade Targets 150ms Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Monthly Token Holders; Alpenglow Upgrade Targets 150ms Finality | YES | HIGH confidence**

As of April 14, 2026, Solana achieved an **all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders** with daily non-vote transactions reaching historic highs of 148 million.[1] The highly anticipated **Alpenglow consensus upgrade has been confirmed**, aiming to slash transaction finality

signals.headline: Trump Issues 48-Hour Ultimatum to Iran on Strait of Hormuz, Threatens 'All Hell' and 'Obliteration' with 'Glory Be to Go
signals.raw:
Trump Issues 48-Hour Ultimatum to Iran on Strait of Hormuz, Threatens 'All Hell' and 'Obliteration' with 'Glory Be to God' | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Trump posted on Truth Social demanding Iran reopen the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours or face massive retaliation, signaling potential escalation amid perceived U.S. strategic setbacks[1].
